1824620.name: Trainz 2022 DLC - Rodnye Prostory Route
1824620.description: This route simulates railroads Of 'Commonwealth of Independent States' Region of Eurasia with 1520mm gauge track. There are lots of various and interesting landscapes, from Hills to Fields and Sea. Particular attention was paid to high level of detailing to get the best route experience. Route includes 38 Km. of Main single track, and 9 Km. of Double track to Chkalovo. The total route length is about 58 Km. Electrified with 27.5 Kv. AC and 3.0 Kv. DC.
1824620.supported_languages: 英语, 意大利语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 捷克语, 荷兰语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 简体中文
